diagnostics.note: Context deltas are token-count estimates. Non-growth or decreases mean the source rows may not be literal prefix-growing prompts; future sampling should treat those deltas as approximate.

name: chat_multiturn
note: ShareGPT raw multi-turn source is not stored locally, so this artifact is derived from existing per-turn benchmark summaries.
token_estimator: estimated_tokens = int(word_count * 1.35) when raw input_tokens are absent
